headline: Czech & CEE Founder Media Monitoring Digest

items.title: Polish-Based GRAI Secures €7.65M Seed Funding
items.body: GRAI, a Polish startup, has successfully secured €7.65 million in seed funding to develop its AI-powered music remix platform. This funding marks a significant step in their efforts to innovate within the music industry.

items.title: Polish Warsaw Equity Group Leads €5M Series A
items.body: The Polish Warsaw Equity Group has led a €5 million Series A investment alongside Porsche Ventures, focusing on emerging technologies in the electric vehicle charging sector. This investment highlights the growing interest in sustainable tech solutions within the region.

items.title: Slovenia's Strategy for Startup Growth
items.body: Slovenia is rethinking its approach to startup internationalisation, focusing on the CEE-DACH corridor for better market access. The government has adopted a new strategy aimed at doubling the number of startups per capita and increasing venture capital investments.

items.title: Google Veteran Discusses CEE's AI Landscape
items.body: A former Google executive has joined Bulgarian startup AdScout, emphasizing the complementary strengths of the US and CEE in the AI sector. He noted that while the US leads in capital, CEE excels in building efficient, durable products.
